meaning: n.[生化]免疫血球素,免疫球蛋白
examples: Those who did well on the memory test had an increase in levels of immunoglobulin A, an antibody that's the body's first line of defense against germs.
These abnormal LPL cells produce large amounts of the protein immunoglobulin and macroglobulin.
D immunoglobulin (RhoGAM) is administered to Rh-negative, unsensitized patients to prevent isoimmunization.
It specifically targets the antibody immunoglobulin E (IgE), which is involved in the allergic process in asthma.
Her immunosuppressive medications were stopped, and she was treated with specific immunoglobulin treatments and recovered without lasting ill effects.
